am.actortab-button.name: A5e Mancer
am.app.no-description: No description available for this item.
am.app.optionsSaved: Progress saved! Reopen A5e Mancer to continue.
am.app.start.preamble.title: Welcome to A5e Mancer!
am.app.start.preamble.text:
This wizard will guide you through creating a character for Level Up: Advanced 5th Edition. You'll choose your Heritage (ancestry), Culture (upbringing), Background (pre-adventure life), Destiny (long-term purpose), and Class. Then you'll set ability scores, flesh out your biography, and review everything before submitting.

Navigate using the tabs above or the Next/Previous buttons below. Use Save for Later to return another time.
am.app.heritage.none: No heritage compendiums found. Configure compendiums in settings.
am.app.culture.none: No culture compendiums found. Configure compendiums in settings.
am.app.background.none: No background compendiums found. Configure compendiums in settings.
am.app.destiny.none: No destiny compendiums found. Configure compendiums in settings.
am.app.class.none: No class compendiums found. Configure compendiums in settings.
am.app.abilities.preamble: Assign scores to Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma using the method below. In A5e these scores work the same as in standard 5e.
am.app.abilities.point-buy.title: Point Buy
am.app.abilities.point-buy.description: Spend your point budget to set each ability. Higher scores cost more points.
am.app.abilities.standard-array.title: Standard Array
am.app.abilities.standard-array.descript: Assign each value from the array to one ability. Each value can only be used once.
am.app.abilities.manual.title: Manual Roll
am.app.abilities.manual.description: Roll the configured formula for each ability and enter the result, or click the dice icon to roll automatically.
am.app.abilities.chained-rolls-info: Chained Rolls are enabled. Click any die to roll all abilities in sequence.
am.app.abilities.no-method: No ability score method configured. Please check module settings.
am.app.abilities.a5e-note: A5e uses the same six abilities as standard 5e. Your Heritage and Culture will grant additional proficiencies and features once the character is created.
am.app.biography.traits-placeholder: How does your character act and think?
am.app.biography.bonds-placeholder: Who or what is most important to your character?
am.app.biography.flaws-placeholder: What are your character's weaknesses or failings?
am.app.biography.backstory-placeholder: Describe your character's life before adventuring. How did they come to have their Heritage, Culture, Background, and Destiny?
am.app.biography.connections-hint: A5e tracks Connections (important relationships) and Mementos (meaningful objects) as part of your Background.
am.app.biography.connections-placeholder: Important people, organisations, or places in your character's life.
am.app.biography.mementos-placeholder: A meaningful object your character carries — a keepsake, a reminder, or a symbol of who they are.
am.app.biography.destiny-rolls-hint: Each destiny has its own Source of Motivation and Goals tables. Roll the die or fill in the result manually after consulting your destiny's description.
am.app.biography.destiny-motivation-plac: What drives your character toward this destiny? Roll d4 or write your own.
am.app.biography.destiny-goals-placehold: What short-term steps is your character taking to fulfil this destiny? Roll d6 or write your own.
am.app.biography.roll-motivation: Roll d4 on your destiny's Source of Motivation table
am.app.biography.roll-goals: Roll d6 on your destiny's Goals table
am.app.finalize.instructions: Review your choices below. When everything looks right, click Create Character.
am.app.finalize.grants-notice: When your character is created, the A5e Grants system will automatically apply bonuses, proficiencies, features, and other benefits from your Heritage, Culture, Background, Destiny, and Class. No additional steps are required — everything fires on item creation.
am.errors.document-loading-failed: A5e Mancer failed to load compendium documents. Check the console for details.
am.errors.character-creation-failed: Character creation failed. Please ensure all required fields are filled in.
am.errors.art-picker-failed: Could not open the file picker.
am.errors.select-class: Please select a Class before submitting.
am.errors.enter-name: Please enter a character name before submitting.
am.settings.enable.name: Enable A5e Mancer
am.settings.enable.hint: Adds an A5e Mancer button to the Actors directory.
am.settings.logger.name: Logging Level
am.settings.logger.hint: Controls how much A5e Mancer logs to the browser console.
am.settings.nav-buttons.name: Show Navigation Buttons
am.settings.nav-buttons.hint: Show Previous / Next buttons at the bottom of each tab.
am.settings.player-customization.name: Allow Player Customisation
am.settings.player-customization.hint: Let players set their colour, pronouns, and avatar during character creation.
am.settings.token-customization.name: Allow Token Customisation
am.settings.token-customization.hint: Let players configure basic token display settings.
am.settings.randomize.name: Enable Randomise Button
am.settings.randomize.hint: Shows a Randomise button that generates a random name.
am.settings.ability-scores.default.name: Default Ability Score
am.settings.ability-scores.default.hint: Starting value for ability scores in Point Buy.
am.settings.ability-scores.min.name: Minimum Ability Score
am.settings.ability-scores.max.name: Maximum Ability Score
am.settings.ability-scores.max.hint: Highest allowed ability score (before racial/heritage bonuses).
am.settings.roll-formula.name: Manual Roll Formula
am.settings.roll-formula.hint: Dice formula used for manual ability score rolling. Default: 4d6kh3.
am.settings.point-buy.name: Point Buy Budget
am.settings.point-buy.hint: Total points available in Point Buy mode. Standard is 27.
am.settings.chained-rolls.name: Chained Rolls
am.settings.chained-rolls.hint: When enabled, clicking one die rolls all six abilities in sequence.
am.settings.alignments.name: Alignments
am.settings.alignments.hint: Comma-separated list of alignments shown in the Biography tab.
am.settings.alignment-faith-inputs.name: Use Free-Text for Alignment
am.settings.alignment-faith-inputs.hint: Show a text input instead of a dropdown for Alignment.
am.app.heritageGift.preamble: Your Heritage grants you one Gift — a special trait that further defines your ancestry. Choose one from the options below. Hover over each for a description.
am.app.heritageGift.select-heritage-firs: Select a Heritage first to see available gifts.
am.app.heritageGift.auto-grants: Heritage Gifts for this heritage are applied automatically by the A5e Grants system.
am.app.heritageGift.auto-grants-hint: When your character is created, the system will apply all features from your Heritage. If a choice is required, a dialog will appear on your character sheet.
am.app.heritageGift.none-available: No Heritage Gifts found for this heritage in your compendiums. Gifts will be applied by the Grants system on character creation.
am.app.equipment.select-class-for-wealth: Select a Class to see the starting wealth formula.
am.app.equipment.no-wealth-data: No wealth formula found for this class. Enter an amount manually.
am.app.equipment.no-structured-data: This item's equipment data is not in a machine-readable format. Check the item description for details.
am.app.equipment.select-class-first: Select a Class to see starting equipment options.
am.app.equipment.select-background-first: Select a Background to see starting equipment options.
am.app.equipment.grants-note: Some equipment may be granted automatically by the A5e Grants system when your character is created.
am.levelup.button-hint: Open the A5e Mancer Level Up wizard
am.levelup.title: Level Up: {name}
am.levelup.asi-hint: At this level you gain an ASI (+2 to one ability or +1 to two) or a Feat. Select a feat from your compendiums, or apply the ASI manually on your character sheet after creation.
am.levelup.asi-note: Note: ASI (+2/+1+1) must be applied manually on the character sheet. Select a feat here only if taking a feat instead.
am.levelup.knack-hint: At every even level you gain an Exploration Knack — a special ability for use outside combat.
am.maneuvers.slots-full: You can only select {n} maneuver(s). Deselect one first.
am.maneuvers.none-found: No maneuvers match the current filter.
am.maneuvers.select-tradition-hint: Select a tradition on the left to browse maneuvers.
am.maneuvers.pick-prompt: You can learn {n} new maneuver(s) at this level.
am.maneuvers.sheet-button-hint: Open the A5e Mancer maneuver manager
am.app.maneuvers.preamble: Your class grants you combat maneuvers — special techniques powered by your Exertion Pool. Choose your starting maneuvers from one or more Combat Traditions.
am.app.maneuvers.exertion-info: You gain an Exertion Pool equal to double your proficiency bonus. Maneuvers cost exertion to use.
am.app.maneuvers.traditions-needed: You know {n} Combat Tradition(s). Select your first when picking maneuvers.
am.app.maneuvers.select-class-first: Select a Class first to see maneuver options.
am.app.maneuvers.class-no-maneuvers: This class does not use Combat Maneuvers at level 1.
am.app.maneuvers.class-no-maneuvers-hint: Some classes gain maneuvers through archetypes or feats at later levels.
am.app.spells.preamble: Your class grants you magical abilities. Choose your starting cantrips and spells from your class spell list.
am.app.spells.prepared-note: Prepared caster: you can prepare spells equal to your spellcasting modifier + your level each long rest.
am.app.spells.select-class-first: Select a Class first to see spell options.
am.app.spells.class-no-spells: This class is not a spellcaster.
am.app.spells.class-no-spells-hint: Non-spellcasting classes may gain spell-like abilities through their Heritage or Archetype.
am.spells.title: Choose Spells — {class}
am.spells.none-found: No spells match the current filter.
am.spells.cantrips-full: You can only choose {n} cantrip(s). Deselect one first.
am.spells.spells-full: You can only choose {n} spell(s). Deselect one first.
